summary: VenuLoQ UI/UX improvement pass - All 12 requested features verified on mobile viewport (390x844). Scroll-to-top on route change, no pre-selected filters on search page, emotional CTAs updated, Airbnb-style mobile cards all working correctly.

search_page_no_preselected_filters.details: Search page /venues/search loads with NO pre-selected filters - Wedding chip is NOT active by default

quick_filter_chips_toggle.details: Wedding, Corporate, Reception, Birthday chips toggle correctly when tapped (active state: bg-[#111111] text-white)

rounded_pill_filter_chips.details: Filter chips have rounded-full pill style as requested

venue_cards_airbnb_style.details: Venue cards display with full-width images on top (aspect-[16/10]) in Airbnb-style layout

heart_compare_buttons_visible.details: Heart (favorite) and Compare buttons visible on venue card images (40+ fav buttons, 20+ compare buttons found)

venue_detail_scroll_to_top.details: Venue detail page /venues/mumbai/taj-mahal-palace-mumbai loads correctly at top of page (scroll position = 0)

sticky_cta_start_planning.details: Sticky CTA shows 'Start Planning' text (NOT 'Enquire Now') - verified in data-testid='sticky-enquire-btn'

enquiry_intro_start_planning_your_event.details: Clicking 'Start Planning' opens enquiry form intro screen with 'Start Planning Your Event' button (NOT 'Start Consultation')

enquiry_form_header_plan_your_event.details: Enquiry form header shows 'Plan Your Event' (NOT 'Concierge Intake')

submit_button_connect_me_with_expert.details: Submit button shows 'Connect Me with an Expert' (NOT 'Submit Request') - verified in code at line 1330

scroll_to_top_on_navigation.details: Pages scroll to top when navigating between routes (search → detail → back). ScrollToTop component working correctly at App.js line 133-139

view_toggle_list_map.details: View toggle (list/map) works on mobile - both buttons functional

venue_type_dropdown.details: Venue Type dropdown works correctly - opens 'Select Venue Types' popover

sort_dropdown.details: Sort dropdown visible and functional on mobile

cta_text_changes_verified.submit_button: 'Submit Request' → 'Connect Me with an Expert' (EnquiryForm.js line 1330)

code_review.scroll_to_top_implementation: App.js lines 133-139: ScrollToTop component uses useLocation() + useEffect() to scroll to window.scrollTo(0, 0) on pathname change
code_review.no_localstorage_filters: VenueSearchPage.js line 155-180: getInitialFilters() only uses URL params - no localStorage auto-restore
code_review.mobile_venue_card: MobileVenueCard.js: Full-width image with aspect-[16/10], heart button top-right, compare button next to it

context_for_next_testing_agent: VenuLoQ UI/UX improvements verified. All 4 CTA text changes confirmed: 'Start Planning' (sticky), 'Start Planning Your Event' (intro), 'Plan Your Event' (form header), 'Connect Me with an Expert' (submit). Scroll-to-top working via ScrollToTop component in App.js. No pre-selected filters on search page - getInitialFilters no longer uses localStorage.
